_doc: Logs surface the CredProvider TEMP-path error at executor start and note it is a known issue on older Robot builds. The credential provider directory handling was fixed in a later Robot release.

Data.Message: Job 'bbccddee-2233-4455-6677-8899aabbccdd' failed to start. Could not start executor. Could not find a part of the path 'C:\Windows\TEMP\UiPath\CredProvider'.
[Robot] Executor bootstrap failed creating the credential-provider working directory under C:\Windows\TEMP\UiPath\CredProvider. This matches a known Robot defect on builds prior to 23.10.9.
